findings.evidence: fetch_report still calls client.fetch(url, timeout=60). After the unit change, 60 is now interpreted as 60 ms instead of 60 seconds — a 1000x timeout reduction. The comment explicitly says "give it a full minute" but the effective budget is now 0.06 s, virtually guaranteeing timeouts on slow report endpoints.

test_fetch_report_uses_client only asserts result["status"] == 200 and never checks ft.last["timeout_s"]. This allows the jobs.py regression (60 ms instead of 60 s) to slip through the test suite silently.
